mapper.select:
SELECT c.content_id AS contentId, c.title AS title, c.main_image_path AS main_image_path, c.category AS category, c.location AS location, c.start_at AS start_at, c.end_at AS end_at FROM content c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT content_id, COUNT(*) AS res_cnt FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND reservation_status IN ('PAID','CONFIRMED') GROUP BY content_id ) r ON r.content_id = c.content_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT content_id, COUNT(*) AS like_cnt FROM content_like GROUP BY content_id ) l ON l.content_id = c.content_id WHERE
AND c.end_at >= NOW() ORDER BY (COALESCE(r.res_cnt,0)*3 + COALESCE(l.like_cnt,0)) DESC, c.start_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.content_id AS contentId, c.title AS title, c.main_image_path AS main_image_path, c.category AS category, c.content_kind AS content_kind, c.location AS location, c.start_at AS start_at, c.end_at AS end_at FROM content c WHERE
AND c.start_at > NOW() ORDER BY c.start_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
